settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.subtitle: Quick answers on compatibility, shipping, returns, warranty and bulk orders.

settings.heading: Common questions
settings.subtitle: Still stuck? Contact us and a real person will help.

settings.question: Will smart lights work with Alexa, Google or Siri?
settings.answer: Most of our smart range works with Alexa, Google Home and Apple Home via apps like Tuya, Smart Life, Mi Home and Hue. See our Smart Home Hub for details.

settings.question: How fast is delivery?
settings.answer: Order before 4 PM for same-day delivery in Doha, 1–2 days elsewhere in Qatar, plus GCC and UK shipping. See Shipping & Delivery.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: You can return within 7 days of delivery in the original, unused packaging. See our Returns & Refunds page.

settings.question: Are products covered by warranty?
settings.answer: Yes. Every product is genuine and covered by a local warranty handled by our Doha team.

settings.question: Do you offer bulk or trade pricing?
settings.answer: Yes. For projects, offices and villas we offer volume pricing. Request a quote on our Bulk Orders page.
